story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_0100_10:
We both seem to have changed since our
last battle.
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_0300_10:
Now, there’s only one thing to do. Let’s see
how far our training’s taken us!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_0600_10: We’ll reach our future of victory!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_0800_10: We’re gonna win this time, too!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1101_0900_20:
Unbelievable! This time, both participants
Mega Evolved immediately!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_1000_10:
I can feel another heart—one deeply
connected.
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_1500_10:
I can’t believe they can use Mega Evolution
so well.
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_1600_10:
You’ve exceeded my expectations, Sabrina!
As always!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_1900_10:
*chuckle*
I see you wasted no time.
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_2600_10: I see you’ve awakened your arc suit as well!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_2800_10:
We’ll show you our Mega-Evolved psychic
powers!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_3100_10: Her Pokémon can read her mind?!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_3300_10: They both must see the same future.
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_3400_10:
If they’re getting their power from the
future, then we’ll get ours from the past!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_3500_10:
I’ll win for everyone who’s overcome so
much with us!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_3600_10:
Everything I’ve gained battling alongside
Lucario...
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_3900_10:
Our hearts are now connected to countless
others.
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_4000_10:
And these connections become bonds—and
our strength.
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_4100_10: I can’t foresee who’ll win this battle.
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_4300_10:
Now I can move forward, trusting my and
my partner’s future together—hearts united.
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_4400_10: I have neither fear nor worries.
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_4500_10: But I do have the certainty we’ll win!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_4600_10:
I trust the path I’ve traveled with my
Pokémon...
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_4700_10: And I trust the path we’ll continue to take!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_5100_10:
I guess the battle turned out just as you
predicted, Sabrina!
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_5200_10: But now, we’ve both won one and lost one.
story_arceus_09_10000/2401_1001_5300_10: This time, I’ll let YOU ask for a rematch.
